messages.content:
Thank you for your request. To check the status of your order, I will need you to provide the following information:

1. Your full name
2. The last 4 digits of your social security number
3. Your date of birth (in YYYY-MM-DD format)

Once you have provided this information, I can look up the status of your order. Please let me know if you have any other questions!

Thank you for providing your name 'LA'. To check the status of your order, I will also need the last 4 digits of your social security number and your date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format. Once you have that information ready, please provide it and I'll be happy to look up the status of your order. Let me know if you have any other questions!

Thank you for providing the last 4 digits of your social security number as 1234. To check the status of your order, I will also need your full name and date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format. Once you have that information ready, please provide it and I'll be happy to look up the status of your order. Let me know if you have any other questions!

Thank you for providing your date of birth as ****-**-**. To check the status of your order, I will also need your full name. Once you have that information ready, please provide it and I'll be happy to look up the status of your order. Let me know if you have any other questions!
order, my name is LA, ssn ****, dob ****-**-**

Based on the information you provided, your order is currently in a "Pending" status and is waiting for carrier pickup. I don't have an estimated delivery date available at this time. Please let me know if you need any other assistance with your order.
